title: Add BuilderIdentityAnnotation to identify buildah version
body:
Record the version of buildah used to build the image as a label
in the image.

Signed-off-by: Daniel J Walsh <dwalsh@redhat.com>

comments.body:
[APPROVALNOTIFIER] This PR is **APPROVED** This pull-request has been approved by: *rhatdan* The full list of commands accepted by this bot can be found [here](?repo=containers%2Fpodman). The pull request process is described [here]()
Needs approval from an approver in each of these files: - ~~[OWNERS](https://github.com/containers/podman/blob/master/OWNERS)~~ [rhatdan] Approvers can indicate their approval by writing `/approve` in a comment Approvers can cancel approval by writing `/approve cancel` in a comment
Though, I suspect you just broke a number of our tests that check image labels

> Resolves a buildah issue #7229

#7229 is this pull request. Maybe you meant https://github.com/containers/buildah/issues/1864.
Closing this as it will be fixed in buildah Vendoring.
